attribute.strength-explanation: Increases the damage dealt by physical attacks and techniques.
attribute.defense-explanation: Reduces the damage taken from physical attacks.
attribute.spirit-explanation: Increases the damage dealt by magical techniques and affects maximum MP.
attribute.wisdom-explanation: Improves magical hit rate, evasion against magic, and reduces damage taken from magical attacks.
attribute.speed-explanation: Determines turn order in battle and improves overall evasion rate.
attribute.charisma-explanation: Increases Digimon popularity, lowers shop prices, and allows battling certain Tamers.
